1.3.0","description":"The main focus of this version is on implementing the tools that help achieve security under the application-aware homomorphic encryption model described in https://eprint.iacr.org/2024/203","creator":{"login":"yspolyakov","id":89226542,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjg5MjI2NTQy","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/89226542?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/yspolyakov","html_url":"https://github.com/yspolyakov","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/yspolyakov/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/yspolyakov/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/yspolyakov/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/yspolyakov/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/yspolyakov/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/yspolyakov/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/yspolyakov/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/yspolyakov/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/yspolyakov/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"open_issues":6,"closed_issues":0,"state":"open","created_at":"2024-04-19T02:44:59Z","updated_at":"2024-06-26T19:14:14Z","due_on":null,"closed_at":null},"comments":1,"created_at":"2024-05-16T14:59:52Z","updated_at":"2024-08-01T20:54:45Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"According to https://github.com/openfheorg/openfhe-development/pull/742#issuecomment-2067298817: 
To make it easier to use the library I wanted to bring the lib to vcpkg. While doing so, I noticed some areas that could be improved, mainly by trying to compile with msvc, but that only made the errors visible. 

https://github.com/openfheorg/openfhe-development/pull/742: The begin function could return an iterator object depending on your build settings (for example debug msvc, but you can also do this with gcc and clang). 

https://github.com/openfheorg/openfhe-development/pull/743: Why using compiler specific extensions when there are standard attributes? 

https://github.com/openfheorg/openfhe-development/pull/744: Finish refactoring that you started. Also fixes the msvc build. 

https://github.com/openfheorg/openfhe-development/pull/746: Detected while compiling for android. 

https://github.com/openfheorg/openfhe-development/pull/747: On the way to msvc support. 

https://github.com/openfheorg/openfhe-development/pull/748: Nicer way to define `_USE_MATH_DEFINES`. The the include order is also not important. (If i include math.h before your header your header is currently broken.)

https://github.com/openfheorg/openfhe-development/pull/749: Use the c++ implementation as fallback, allows msvc support. 

https://github.com/openfheorg/openfhe-development/pull/750: No need to rely on bash if there is an cmake builtin for it ","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/openfheorg/openfhe-development/issues/770/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/openfheorg/openfhe-development/issues/770/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/openfheorg/openfhe-development/issues/comments/2263972714","html_url":"https://github.com/openfheorg/openfhe-development/issues/770#issuecomment-2263972714","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/openfheorg/openfhe-development/issues/770","id":2263972714,"node_id":"IC_kwDOG8rDbM6G8Xtq","user":{"login":"hydrogeohc","id":30784779,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjMwNzg0Nzc5","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/30784779?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/hydrogeohc","html_url":"https://github.com/hydrogeohc","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/hydrogeohc/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/hydrogeohc/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/hydrogeohc/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/hydrogeohc/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/hydrogeohc/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/hydrogeohc/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/hydrogeohc/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/hydrogeohc/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/hydrogeohc/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2024-08-01T20:54:44Z","updated_at":"2024-08-01T20:54:44Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"I am new here.
